title: Open The Tasmac Lyrics Maan Karate Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Open The Tasmac
Singer:  Deva, Anirudh
Music: Anirudh
Movie: Maan Karate
Lyrics: Gaana Baala

Sari sari sari ga ma padha ne sa ri
ma pa ma pa ma pa tha ni tha ma pa

thanniyadicha thappaamaa
thittraama goppaama, yema.?

Sari sari sari ga ma padha ne sa ri
ma pa ma pa ma pa tha ni tha ma pa

thanniyadicha thappaamaa
thittraama goppaama, aammaa ?

Manase en manase, usure en usure
kada kadayaa theaddurendi
kayila battulu maattala di
kayila battulu maattala di
oru katting kannula kaattala di (2)

Ye open the tasmac-u
ye open the tasmac-u
ye open the tasmac-u

dont close the tasmacu go maa
atleast open the back door
ek dho theen chaar...

ayyayayaoo dubakoor peteru da
suttu potu pidichitaandaa
superaana figurea thaan.

ammammamamaa face konja kaattuma
parichakku pogaamalaye
aayiduraan pass-uma

High text maiyya pottu
ava manasa maathitten
inox theatrela padatha ottiten

vaalillaa kathaadiyaa
vanathula parakkuren.
vaarathula ettu naalu
thannila medhakuren.

My building romba strong-uma
aana basementu romba weak-uma

illa basementu romba strong-uma
buildingu romba weak-uma

Ye open the tasmac-u
ye open the tasmac-u
ye open the tasmac-u

dont close the tasmacu go maa
atleast open the back door

start start.. start music.
sexy baby, come n touch me
ek thuje keliye, you and me
nadhirthana thiranaanaa seiyaalaama
come to maamaa.
Vaa munimaa vaa munimaa
vaa munimaa vaa.
hey ishta lakkadi laala sundhari
kolaa kuppura thaa. (2)

ye open the tasmac-u
dont close the tasmac-u
ye open the tasmac-u
dont close the tasmac-u

dont close the tasmacu go maa
pleas open aall time-mu maa..

i am very happy ..
happy happy happy....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Open The Tasmac, the characters celebrate life and the joy of togetherness, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of festivity, making it a perfect party anthem. The song conveys a sense of freedom and enjoyment, resonating with the audience's desire to celebrate moments with friends. Overall, it encapsulates the vibrant energy of the movie Maan Karate and leaves listeners feeling uplifted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Open The Tasmac is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Anirudh's infectious beats and Deva's lively vocals, this track from the movie Maan Karate is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the electrifying energy that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: My mind, my life, I can't change the things in my hands, I can't change the things in my hands, show me with one eye.
Open the Tasmac, open the Tasmac, open the Tasmac.
Don't close the Tasmac, at least open the back door.
Oh, I feel like a superstar, I have a great figure.
Can you show your face a little? Without hiding, it seems like you are passing by, is it a pass?
I put on high text and changed her mind, I watched a movie in Inox theater.
I am flying in the sky, I am soaring in the world. I am standing tall in the country.
My building is very strong, but the basement is very weak.
No, the basement is very strong, but the building is very weak.
Open the Tasmac, open the Tasmac, open the Tasmac.
Don't close the Tasmac, at least open the back door.
Start, start... start the music. Sexy baby, come and touch me, just for you, you and me, let's not waste time, come to me. Come, come, come.
Open the Tasmac, don't close the Tasmac, open the Tasmac, don't close the Tasmac.
Don't close the Tasmac, please open all the time.
I am very happy... happy happy happy...
